CHANGE RECORD 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this 
table.  The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The 
fourth column should mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document covers the Copernicus Marine Service Baltic (BAL) regional observation datasets for the  
near-real time (NRT) and reprocessed  (MY) products. Table 1 show the list of products available 
through the Ocean Colour Thematic Assembly Centre (OCTAC) of the Copernicus Marine Service  
(CMEMS), the scientific validation of which is provided in this document.  
The BAL chlorophyll-a and the water reflectance datasets based on Sentinel -3 OLCI at ~300m spatial 
resolution are produced both in NRT and in MY  (from 2016 onwards) based on the EUMETSAT OLCI 
V3.0.1 reprocessing completed in 2022 as the daily Level-3 (L3) and monthly Level 4 (L4) (Table 1, Table 
2). 
The BAL 1997-2023 reprocessed MY time series includes surface chlorophyll concentration (CHL), both 
as daily L3 and monthly L4, and daily L3 remote-sensing reflectances (Rrs)  at ~1 km spatial resolution 
(Table 1, Table 2). This subset of remote sensing reflectances (bands 412-443-490-510-555-670) were 
directly extracted from ESA OC-CCI (European Space Agency Ocean Colour Climate Change Initiative)  
Rrs input daily composites, provided for Copernicus Marine Service by the Plymouth Marine 
Laboratory (PML), which uses the OC-CCI processor (version 6.01) to merge at high resolution MERIS, 
MODIS-AQUA, SeaWiFS, VIIRS and OLCI data. These data are remapped over the Baltic grid and 
repacked for complianc e with the CMEMS format standards. The global quality information of the 
input data is presented in OC-CCI global MY QUID (CMEMS-OC-QUID-009-107to1082). 
 
Table 1: List of products for which the scientific validation info is provided in this document  
EPST name (OC-CNR-ROME-IT) Zon

catalog_entry.summary: This document provides a quality information document (QUID) for Baltic Sea observation products from the Ocean Colour Thematic Assembly Centre, covering near-real time and reprocessed datasets based on Sentinel-3 OLCI data.

variables.long_name: Chlorophyll concentration in the water column
